error_signature: TimeoutError: The operation was aborted due to timeout
title: Timeout error after upgrading n8n
symptom: After upgrading n8n, the application hangs and throws a timeout error, preventing workflows from loading.
root_cause: The upgrade to versions 1.87 and later introduced changes that may have caused compatibility issues with the posthog-node integration, leading to websocket timeouts and application hangs.
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.86.1 or earlier to resolve the timeout issue.
